title: smallanthus
intro: Smallanthus sonchifolius, also known as Yacon, is a perennial plant native to the Andean region of South America, belonging to the dandelion family. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its rhizome, which contains inulin, a prebiotic fiber that can help regulate blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The health benefits of Yacon include its ability to support weight loss, lower cholesterol levels, and improve overall gut health. Smallanthus sonchifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or syrup, with its leaves and flowers also being used in salads and as a culinary ingredient.
